notes: Baseline arm. Skimmed RelativePositioning.floorplan and StyledApartment.floorplan for syntax. Designed a 480 sqft studio: Sleeping/Living 24x15=360, Vestibule 4x5=20, Bathroom 5x5=25, Kitchen 15x5=75; total 480 sqft. Used relative positioning (above/right-of). Rendered via floorplan-mcp-server out/utils parser+renderer (generateSvg + svgToPng) at 1200x900.
